sisyphus.description: Primary orchestrator with reasoning enabled. Plans multi-step solutions via symbolic delegation. High reasoning (150 steps).

opencoder.description: Graph-aware coder using GPT-5-mini. Follows AST/LSP call hierarchies to prevent hallucinations.

oracle.description: Research specialist. Accesses live web + Context7 for verified documentation. Balanced performance for web search.

speed_reader.description: Ultra-fast lightweight agent for quick code analysis and summarization. Speed-critical tasks.

fast_coder_grok.description: Agentic coding agent with 256K context. Supports reasoning loops and parallel tool execution. Best for complex multi-step tasks and large codebase analysis.
